title: 博客の搭建
content:
体会
MyHexo博客的搭建过程还真是艰难啊，今天又不小心把博客本地数据给全删了…

title: Macの使用心得
content:
Mac的基本软件
首先我最喜欢的软件莫过于Downie 4，因为它基本可以下载市面上所有网站的视频，包括Bilibili。但是呢，我认为还是应该有版权意识，自己下载来看就行了，不要用来损害创作者的利益…

title: Hi World
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick Start
Create a new post
1$ hexo new "My New Post"
More info: Writing
Run server
1$ hexo server
More info: Server
Generate static files
1$ hexo generate
More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites
1$ hexo deploy
More info: Deployment
